summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.3.11 to 0.8.3.12 (Config.xcconfig change shown in diff:d12b1f0780d4 and file:e406f75b2ca7; commit metadata in commit:218c62173748).
summary.userFacingImpact: This change updates a development version constant (APP_DEV_VERSION) in a configuration file; the diff shows only the version string change and no code or behavior changes (see diff:d12b1f0780d4, file:e406f75b2ca7). There is no evidence in the supplied change that this alters runtime behavior or user-visible features; however, the supplied sources are limited to the config file change, so the broader impact on builds/distribution cannot be fully determined from these files alone and requires human review (see commit:218c62173748, diff:d12b1f0780d4).
